race.description: Summerset Retirement Village Cranbourne Mdn Plate
race.comment: SWEET VIXEN (11) looked sharp at the jumpouts before her narrow defeat at Sale on debut. Raced forward and she's the one to beat with the extra fitness. CIRCUS CIRCUS (3) has looked promising. Kicks off in a shorter sprint this time with two jumpouts under the saddle. Has a low gate and will be naturally improved. Jordan Childs gets off the above to stick with resuming stablemate GATTINO VELOCE (5). She didn't show much on debut but will have come on and jumps from the inside barrier. Worth a close betting watch. SHE'S LOADED (10) improved again beaten 2L at Geelong before a plain effort at Werribee. She's better then that and will bet every chance from a nice gate and with John Allem sticking aboard.
